creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
Created attachment 189330
Proposed patch for options (since 453790)

Hello.

(In reply to comment #24)
> For a whole year the community can not decide to adopt a variant or add both
> as options.
I attached some patch, which adds INOTIFY and KQUEUE as options, based on attachment #177118 from Vladimir Kondratyev. Possible to change OPTIONS_DEFAULT to other value, if needed.
